questions.text: A company uses a database to store customer information.

subparts.text: State what is meant by a database.
The company wants to ensure data security. Describe two methods they could use.

questions.text: Students use computers in their school.

subparts.text: Which of the following are input devices?
Explain the difference between RAM and ROM.
Describe what RAM is used for.
Describe what ROM is used for.

questions.text: Falyaz has created a diary using word processing software. The diary entry for 17th May 2020 is shown.

image.alt: Diary entry showing text about a holiday at Cherai Beach with an embedded beach photo
image.caption: 17th May 2020 diary entry

subparts.text: Which of the following are input devices?
Identify two features of word processing software that Falyaz has used in the diary entry.

questions.text: The table shows a comparison of two different types of fitness tracker. A fitness tracker contains a microprocessor, is worn around the wrist and monitors physical readings of the wearer.

subparts.text: You have been asked to design a poster to show this data for the two fitness trackers. Describe two features you would use to make the poster eye-catching.
State which fitness tracker you would recommend and give two reasons for your choice.
